concerns.detail: Identifies a specific student by full name (Yufei Ding) and reveals private academic records including admissions decisions (UCB offer cancellation, Stanford on-hold status, PKU offer reinstatement). PhD students are private individuals and their admissions details constitute personally identifying information.
concerns.excerpt: Yufei Ding 今年stf的phd...被ucb取消offer...stf on hold...北大...又给offer

concerns.detail: Uses the gendered slur '学术妲己' (academic Daji/concubine) to attack the student's character and imply they advance through sexual relationships rather than merit. This is an unsupported personal insult rather than criticism of concrete advising practices.
